_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your credentials. Never commit config.json to git.

push._ntfy_comment: Free push notifications. Install ntfy app on your phone, subscribe to your topic.
push._pushover_comment: Alternative: Pushover (paid one-time $5 app). Set provider to pushover.

campbells._comment: Optional: Campbells Wholesale login for authenticated pricing

schedule._comment: APScheduler cron schedule (if using scheduler.py). All times in Australia/Sydney timezone.
schedule._simple_comment: If using simple scheduler (no APScheduler), set how many hours between checks.

filters._comment: Optional filters applied before sending alerts
